text:
Sorry, There *is* a macro for this kind of situation.

Tadayuki OKADA

--- frexp.3.orig	Tue Mar  6 11:45:53 2001
+++ frexp.3	Tue May 22 12:35:01 2001
@@ -67,7 +67,7 @@
 is a
 .Em double
 with magnitude in the interval
-.Bq 1/2 , 1
+.Eq [ ) 1/2 , 1
 or zero, and
 .Fa value
 equals
